description_long: This awning features a minimalist, angular canopy supported by four slender vertical posts at each corner. The canopy is composed of two triangular fabric panels that meet at a central peak, creating a tent-like structure with a sharp, geometric profile. The fabric appears taut and evenly stretched, providing shade and shelter beneath the structure. The support posts are thin and likely made of metal, giving the awning a lightweight yet sturdy appearance. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for use in parks, plazas, or outdoor seating areas. There are no visible decorative trims, patterns, or branding elements on the canopy.
description: A modern, angular awning with a peaked canopy and four slender metal posts, featuring a minimalist design and solid color fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the peaked canopy and symmetrical triangular panels supported by four posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the canopy and the alignment of the posts, with the central peak visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same triangular canopy structure and post arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the canopy's depth and the central peak from the other side.
attribute_mounting_location: freestanding on flat ground or pavement
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with four vertical posts
